creator: smkelly@slashnet.org
text:
After creating a /var/run/nologin file, all logins are denied.
	This includes 'smkelly', who is in the 'staff' class who SHOULD
	still be able to login.

Fix: 

Magic?  I'm not exactly sure as I'm not farmilliar with
	the login.conf reading functions.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Make a class that allows logins when there is a nologin file.
	Put a user in the class.  Make a nologin file, try to login.
